- Current time: 2024-05-18 09:00 — 2024-05-18 10:00 (duration: 1 hour)

Questions
1) Is this the "Dental check-up" event you want rescheduled? (The title is "Dentist Appointment" but the description matches "dental check-up".)
2) Please provide the clinic's email address to notify (or confirm you want me to add a specific address). I couldn't find a contact for "Downtown Dental Clinic" in your contacts.

Planned change (to confirm)
- New start: 2024-05-20 10:00
- New end: 2024-05-20 11:00 (keeps the original 1-hour duration)
- I will notify both you and the clinic by email about the new time (I can use a brief default message unless you want custom wording).
